title: Bridge Essay: Facilitate insight by non-invasive brain stimulation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Facilitate, insight, by, non-invasive, brain.

**Facilitate insight by non-invasive brain stimulation.** — PLoS One. PMID: 21311746. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0016655. Our experiences can blind us. Once we have learned to solve problems by one method, we often have difficulties in generating solutions involving adifferent kind of insight. Yet there is evidence that people with brain lesions are sometimes more resistant to this so-called mental set effect. This inspired us to investigate whether the mental set effect can be reduced by non-invasive brain stimulation. 60 healthy right-handed participants were asked to take an insight problem solving task while r
